parts.text: {"verdict": "legitimate", "confidence": 0.9, "rationale": "The patch changes an `elif` to an `if`, which means the condition `item._store.get(skipped_by_mark_key, True) and rep.skipped and type(rep.longrepr) is tuple` will always be evaluated, regardless of the outcome of the previous `if/elif` block. This seems to be a logical correction to ensure skip location reporting is handled correctly even when `--runxfail` is used, as `--runxfail` should not interfere with skip reporting."}
